name: Capacity Management Analysis Pack
description: Provides utilization analysis and plain-language explanation capabilities for capacity management engineers. Covers data interpretation and stakeholder communication.
author: ai-skills-maintainer

delivery_modes.instructions: Paste your utilization data into Copilot Chat with the skill definition as the system prompt.
The portal can ingest metrics data from connected monitoring tools and pass it directly to this skill.
Expose as an MCP tool for integration with Grafana or Datadog dashboards.
Deploy as a Copilot Studio skill accessible from the capacity planning Teams channel.
Preferred delivery mode for teams with sensitive infrastructure data that cannot leave the corporate network.

configuration.additional_notes: Low temperature for consistent analytical output. The skill handles diverse data formats well.

changelog.notes: Initial package with utilization analysis skill and shared utility skills.
